headline: Rural Sabah Schools Report 40% Teacher Vacancy Rate
context: Interior Division schools in Sabah face severe teacher shortages with 4 out of 10 positions unfilled in early 2026.

cards.big: 436 teaching positions vacant across 187 rural Sabah schools
cards.sub: Some schools have only 2 teachers for 6 grade levels

cards.big: Average transfer request wait for Sabah teachers is 7.3 years
cards.sub: Teachers posted to rural areas often leave the profession entirely

cards.big: Only 12% of rural Sabah schools have reliable internet since 2024
cards.sub: Digital learning alternatives remain impractical for most students

cards.big: SPM pass rates in Interior Division are 23% below national average
cards.sub: Achievement gap has widened every year since 2020

cards.big: Teacher incentives for rural posting must match the actual hardship involved
Is centralized teacher placement the right model for East Malaysia
